name: memory_movement_summary
primary_question: What reviewed aoa-memo corpus and landing movement is represented by the committed owner-corpus snapshot without making stats the owner of memory truth?
derivation_rule: derive one committed corpus, recall, KAG-lift, intake, and landing snapshot from the exact aoa-memo reviewed-object, min-catalog, reviewed-intake, and landing-receipt roots
authority_ceiling: Weaker than aoa-memo reviewed memory objects, landing receipts, and source refs.
